post.description: Register a new user in the system.

OAuth2 compatible token login, retrieve access and refresh tokens.
Expects standard application/x-www-form-urlencoded format with 'username' and 'password' fields.
Note: 'username' should be the user's email address.
Receive a valid refresh token and obtain a new set of access & refresh tokens.

get.description: Get profile information of the currently authenticated active user.

put.description: Update profile details for the currently logged in user.

get.description:
List all platform users with pagination.
Accessible only to SUPER_ADMIN and ADMIN.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users  Get

post.description:
Admin registers a new user with any specified platform role.
Requires 'manage_users' permission.

get.description:
Fetch details of a user by their MongoDB ID.
Accessible only to SUPER_ADMIN and ADMIN.

put.description:
Update a specific user profile and status (e.g. change role, activate/deactivate).
Requires 'manage_users' permission.

delete.description:
Delete a user from the platform permanently.
Requires 'manage_users' permission.

post.description:
Register a new company profile.
Requires 'manage_companies' permission.

get.description:
Get a paginated list of all registered company profiles.
Accessible to any authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Companies Api V1 Companies  Get

get.description: Retrieve specific company profile by its ID.

put.description:
Modify an existing company profile.
Requires 'manage_companies' permission.

delete.description:
Delete a company profile.
Requires 'manage_companies' permission.

post.description:
Create a new job listing for a company.
Requires 'manage_jobs' permission.

get.description: Fetch a paginated list of jobs. Can filter by status (e.g. OPEN, CLOSED).

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Jobs  Get

get.description: Retrieve specific job profile details by ID.

put.description:
Update job description, status, pipeline stages, or recruiters.
Requires 'manage_jobs' permission.

delete.description:
Remove a job listing permanently.
Requires 'manage_jobs' permission.

post.description:
Create a new candidate profile.
Requires 'manage_candidates' permission.

get.description:
Fetch all candidates with pagination. Can filter by skills (comma-separated, matches all skills) and status.
Accessible to admins and recruiters.

schema.title: Response List Candidates Api V1 Candidates  Get

get.description: Retrieve candidate profile by ID.

put.description:
Modify candidate profile details or skills.
Requires 'manage_candidates' permission.

delete.description:
Delete a candidate profile.
Requires 'manage_candidates' permission.

post.description: Submit a candidate application for an open job.

get.description: Get job application details.

put.description: Move the candidate application through different pipeline stages (e.g. Screened -> Interviewing).

post.description:
Submit or register a new client sales lead.
Open to any logged-in user.

get.description:
List registered CRM Leads. Supports filtering by status (NEW, CONTACTED, etc.).
Accessible to admins and recruiters.

schema.title: Response List Leads Api V1 Crm  Get

get.description: Fetch specific CRM lead by ID.

put.description:
Update lead assignment or status.
Requires 'manage_crm' permission.

delete.description:
Delete a CRM Lead.
Requires 'manage_crm' permission.

post.description:
Generate a new workforce invoice for a client company.
Requires 'manage_billing' permission.

get.description:
Fetch a paginated list of all invoices. Can filter by status (e.g. UNPAID, PAID).
Accessible to admins.

schema.title: Response List Invoices Api V1 Billing Invoices Get

get.description: Fetch specific invoice details.

post.description:
Record a new payment transaction against an outstanding invoice.
Automatically transitions invoice status from UNPAID to PAID.

get.description: Fetch paginated historical payment transactions.

schema.title: Response List Payments Api V1 Billing Payments Get

get.description: Public endpoint to list all platform pages.

Public endpoint to fetch published blog posts.

get.description: Public endpoint to get a blog post by its slug.
Public endpoint to retrieve standard service programs.

post.description: Add a new advisory or consulting workforce program.

get.description:
Fetch global KPI metrics for the CoreVita Admin Dashboard.
Performs high-performance counts and aggregates payment revenue directly from MongoDB.

Retrieve historical platform administrative and action audit logs.
Accessible only to SUPER_ADMIN and ADMIN.

schema.title: Response Get Activity Audit Logs Api V1 Admin Audit Logs Get

get.description:
Compile and stream a custom CSV report of all invoices registered on the platform.
Requires 'view_reports' permission.

Service health check endpoint.
Returns status and current runtime environment.
